responseMessageContents.text:
The live site now shows the immersive 9:16 full-bleed deal cards. Verification confirms all immersive elements are live:

- `ivx-imm-media` (10 occurrences) — full-bleed 9:16 media container
- `ivx-imm-overlay` (2) — gradient overlay
- `ivx-imm-bottom` (2) — title, stats, buttons overlay
- `ivx-imm-badge` (9) — filled + outline badges (JV Deal, Active, etc.)
- `ivx-imm-invest` (3) + `ivx-imm-details` (2) — View Deal / Invest Now buttons
- `Restyle with AI` (1) — AI badge

The old `live-deal-content`, `live-deal-metrics`, `live-deal-market-strip`, `live-deal-developer-row`, `live-deal-trust-indicators`, `live-deal-details-btn`, `live-deal-invest-btn` classes are completely gone from the live HTML — only a harmless CSS touch-action rule for `.live-deal-actions button` remains.

**What changed:**
1. **Removed ~230 lines of legacy conflicting CSS** from `index.html` — old 16:10 gallery, content padding, metrics, market strip, developer row, trust indicators, and old button styles were overriding the immersive design
2. **Rewrote `expo/scripts/landing-card-html.mjs`** — the build script injects this card HTML at build time, replacing the old `buildDealCardHtml`. Now produces the full 9:16 immersive card with: full-bleed media, top badges (JV Deal / ACTIVE), right-side action icons (like/comment/save/share), bottom overlay with title + location, ROI/Min Invest/Min Ownership stats, Tokenized/Investment/E pills, "Restyle with AI" badge, View Deal + Invest Now buttons, and "Add a caption..." bar
3. **Bumped `ivx-home-feed.js` cache-bust to `v=20260716c`**
4. **Rebuilt + redeployed** to S3 + CloudFront (cache invalidated)

The landing page now matches the app's Project Reels design. CloudFront invalidation takes 1-2 minutes — if you still see the old cards, hard-refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R / Cmd+Shift+R) to bypass browser cache.

responseMessageContents.title: Updated the property display design to a new full-screen video style and fixed loading issues across the app and website.
responseMessageContents.description: We replaced the old rectangular property cards with a modern, full-screen vertical design for a more immersive experience. This update ensures that property details and investment options look consistent on the home page, the reels section, and the public website. We also fixed several issues where screens would get stuck on a loading spinner, improved how investment data is fetched, and updated the mobile app to include these changes. Finally, we verified that all buttons like "View Deal" and "Invest Now" work correctly on real devices.
